channel.title: Tal Paperin Insights
channel.description: Field notes on B2B sales, fractional CRO leadership, go-to-market and fixing broken revenue.

item.title: A Frum, Shomer Shabbos Fractional Sales Leader
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos fractional sales leader and business consultant who shares your values, respects your calendar, and takes real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Boro Park
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Sales Help for Heimishe Business Owners
item.description: Sales and business help for heimishe business owners, from a frum operator who respects the kehilla, the calendar and the way our world really does business.

item.title: Building a B2B Sales Machine in Western Europe
item.description: How I build a sales machine in Western Europe: market research first, then a focused push on the UK and Eastern Europe, built and run hands-on, not handed over as a deck.

item.title: Sales for the Yiddish-Speaking Business World
item.description: Sales leadership for the Yiddish-speaking, heimishe business world, from a frum operator who knows how it really buys and sells, and works in English with Yiddish-speaking owners.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Miami
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Miami, Florida. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Flatbush
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Flatbush, Brooklyn. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Passaic
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Passaic and Clifton, New Jersey. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Chicago
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Chicago, Illinois. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Baltimore
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Baltimore, Maryland. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Williamsburg
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Kiryas Joel
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Kiryas Joel, Monroe, New York. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Lakewood
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Lakewood, New Jersey. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Los Angeles
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Los Angeles, California. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: How to Sell to the Frum Market
item.description: How to sell into the frum and heimishe market the right way, and how frum businesses break out of the kehilla to sell to the wider world. From a frum sales operator.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Crown Heights
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Crown Heights, Brooklyn. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Monsey
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Monsey, New York. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Five Towns
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in The Five Towns, Long Island. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Building a Sales Operation in the United States
item.description: How to build and run B2B sales in the US market: the buyer culture, the pitfalls, and the sales team, subsidiary and support operation I build and run there.

item.title: Building a Sales Operation in Germany
item.description: Selling B2B in Germany: how German buyers actually buy, the Mittelstand, and the sales team, subsidiary and support operation I build and run there.

item.title: Building a Sales Operation in the United Kingdom
item.description: Selling B2B in the UK: how British buyers actually buy, and the sales team, subsidiary and support operation I build and run there.

item.title: Fractional CRO vs Full-Time CRO: Which Does Your Company Actually Need?
item.description: A practical breakdown of when a fractional CRO beats a full-time hire, what each really costs, and how to tell which one your revenue stage calls for.

item.title: Leadership requires balls. Most people have let theirs atrophy.
item.description: Real leadership comes from hardship, not a workshop in Bali. Why clients hire me over a safe full-time hire, and what to do if you lack it.

item.title: An anti-Israel org targeted me with an ad. It is a masterclass in the wrong ICP.
item.description: A business consultant. A Fractional CRO. A guy who spends most of his day helping companies improve sales, business development and revenue growth. A religious.

item.title: Complex Sales and Long Cycles: How Not to Lose Deals Along the Way
item.description: In complex sales with many decision-makers and a long cycle, most deals do not fall on price, they simply die along the way. How to keep deals alive until signature.

item.title: 20 Sales Problems EVERYONE has - 1 Platform with 20 solutions.
item.description: Most B2B founders are not bad at selling. They are selling without a system.

item.title: Building a Sales Operation in Japan
item.description: Selling B2B in Japan: how Japanese buyers actually buy, consensus and trust, and the sales team, subsidiary and support operation I build and run there.

item.title: Most founders completely misunderstand sales objections.
item.description: A while back I was invited by Professor Philip Tran to teach Objection Handling to his students at the College of San Mateo in California. The lecture.

item.title: Most CEOs don't have a sales problem. They have a motion problem.
item.description: They have a motion problem. They don't know where to start... And where to go next (and how). Their Salespeople (or they themselves) are calling the wrong.

item.title: Building a Sales Operation in France
item.description: Selling B2B in France: how French buyers actually buy, language and relationships, and the sales team, subsidiary and support operation I build and run there.
